game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Side-scrolling, stage-select run-and-gun with tight jump arcs, knockback on hit, and high-penalty hazards (pits/spikes). Defeat any of six Robot Masters in any order; each grants a unique weapon with limited energy that enables new tactics and solves specific boss/obstacle checks. Core loop revolves around pattern reading, damage racing, and weakness routing (choosing the next boss based on weapon effectiveness). Utility is minimal but decisive: the Magnet Beam creates temporary platforms to bridge gaps and access secrets. No slide/charge shot, no Energy Tanks; resource management hinges on weapon drops and sparse refills. Endgame Wily stages emphasize precision on disappearing block (Yoku) sequences and boss gauntlets with limited healing between encounters.
game_info.description: Battle through six Robot Masters in any order you choose! Each defeated boss grants you their unique weapon with limited energy. Master tight platforming over deadly pits and spikes, learn boss attack patterns, and exploit their weaknesses with the right weapon. Use the Magnet Beam to create temporary platforms and reach hidden areas. After clearing the six stages, face the ultimate Wily fortress with disappearing block sequences and a brutal boss gauntlet. No health tanks—manage your resources carefully!
game_info.controls: Arrow Keys: Move left/right, Aim up/down • Space: Jump • Z: Shoot/Confirm • Shift: Cycle weapons • Enter: Start game • Esc: Pause/Unpause • R: Restart to title
